calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion Of The Cpuc To Abandon Tangible Personal Property
Off Calendar Dec-19-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mitchell Shapson, Esq. 415-703-2727 and J.Jason Reiger, Esq. 415-355-5596 of of Public Utilities Commission for Petitioner.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion Of The Califoria Public Utilities Commission to Abandon Tangible Personal Property.

Plaintiff of the State of California's motion of the California Public Utilities Commission to abandon tangible property is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/HK)
